ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the match was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week on which the match was played */,
  "competition" TEXT /* Competition in which the match took place */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the competition */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the squad that played the match */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "match_report" TEXT /* Link to the match report */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators present at the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee officiating the match */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_competition FOREIGN KEY ("competition") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent FOREIGN KEY ("opponent") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_squad_id FOREIGN KEY ("squad_id") REFERENCES squads ("squad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squads" (
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squad */,
  "squad_name" TEXT /* Name of the squad */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the squad is active */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the coach for the squad */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the captain for the squad */,
  "formation" TEXT /* Typical formation used by the squad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the squad the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract started */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract ends */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_squad_id FOREIGN KEY ("squad_id") REFERENCES squads ("squad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "competition_type" TEXT /* Type of competition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the competition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the competition */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was built */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the venue was last renovated */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of playing surface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the coach of the opponent team */,
  "formation" TEXT /* Typical formation used by the opponent team */,
  "last_five_results" TEXT /* Results of the opponent's last five matches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match report */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the match report */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the match report */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "lineup" TEXT /* Lineup of the team for the match */,
  "substitutions" TEXT /* List of substitutions made during the match */,
  "key_moments" TEXT /* Key moments of the match */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to a video of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_reports_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
